So what that means is you can set up a catalog for your e-com and you can get Facebook to pull the right products and the right categories into the ad on cold audiences. Cold audiences are ones that are not clicked into your site so Facebook doesn't have the data from your website, from your pixel to know that this person's in the market for jeans or you know this person's interested in this product whatever it is phone case or whatever it is yet the dynamic product ads for cold audiences or broad audiences as Facebook call it actually works really well and part of the reason is this when you set up the pixel on your site you are telling Facebook about the context of your website and what that means is you're telling Facebook this you know I'm an e-commerce store I'm selling these categories these products etc etc so every time someone hits your website Facebook is storing that data.
